productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Textura Olive Trousers
description: CompositionOlive full length formal trousers made of cotton blend fabric, has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures and brand badge above the right pocket, metal zipper and button closure, loops on the waist to secure a belt and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironA famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and indigo nation makes it all the more easier with its classy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of fabrics to offer a comfortable, fresh feel, this trouser makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
